title: Earlier Roadmap And PM-Cockpit Gate History Demotion Execution
objective: Hard-demote the remaining earlier 2026-05-06 Olares Dev Residency roadmap and PM-cockpit publication gates so those records no longer read like live parent-root publication guidance for the standalone repo boundary.
dependency_note: After Packet 180, the other remaining earlier 2026-05-06 gate branch is the roadmap and PM-cockpit family: the roadmap-trigger realignment gate, the PM-cockpit publication gate, and the later cockpit state-sync and wording-hardening gates. Those records preserve already-closed branch evidence, but their titles and top sections still read like live parent-root publication and host-resync guidance instead of historical provenance.
execution_scope: Retitle the four targeted Olares Dev Residency gate handoffs as historical roadmap/PM-cockpit publication records and add explicit current-routing blocks.
Retitle the four targeted Olares Dev Residency gate packet JSON titles as historical records and add explicit historical-note and current-routing fields.
Preserve the detailed publication, host-resync, and old-clone observation evidence as provenance rather than rewriting the historical bridge records wholesale.
forbidden_scope: broad 2026-05-06 archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing context
host-workflow or workspace-authority gate normalization in the same packet
success_criteria: Each targeted roadmap/PM-cockpit handoff now leads as a historical gate record instead of live parent-root publication guidance.
Each targeted packet JSON now carries explicit historical-note and current-routing context instead of reading like a still-live gate definition.
Repo-owned status routing records the family closure and leaves any remaining non-cockpit residue for fresh reassessment afterward.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-075-packet-073-and-packet-074-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-078-packet-076-and-packet-077-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-080-packet-079-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-082-packet-081-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Historical Olares Dev Residency','^Current routing:'
next_action: Execute this packet as the earlier roadmap/PM-cockpit gate demotion slice after Packet 181 or when it becomes the next truthful adjacent lane.
